news.summary: In France, nearly two months after the start of the appeal trial concerning allegations of Libyan financing of Nicolas Sarkozy's 2007 presidential campaign, the prosecution presented its closing arguments on Monday. FRANCE 24's Olivia Bizot reports.

news.headline: Starmer vows to prove 'doubters' wrong,  bring UK closer to the EU to rescue his job
news.summary: Embattled British Prime Minister Keir Starmer came out fighting Monday, vowing to prove his "doubters" wrong as he sought to quell a growing threat to his leadership following disastrous election results.
